---
title: "P2 --- Honest finite-sample inference for paediatric mortality probability"
author: "Max Moldovan, [Stats PhD student], Usman Iqbal"
date: "2026-05-08"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{P2 --- inductive-CI inference}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

> **Subtitle.** Manuscript draft (vignette form) --- opens after P1 G6. Authors: Max Moldovan (Adelaide, ORCID 0000-0001-9680-8474, lead), Stats PhD student (TBD), Usman Iqbal (Bond, senior).

# Status

Placeholder. Authoring begins after P1 reaches gate G6 (discrimination
+ subgroups). Inherits cohort and feature pipeline from P1.

# Wedge

Apply Max's inductive / globally-optimal CIs to predicted-probability
inference. Re-analyse P1's headline claims and quantify how many
spurious model-comparison conclusions in the prior literature would
collapse under principled finite-sample inference.

# Plan stub

- Inherit `cohort` and `features` from `_targets.R`.
- Add inductive-CI machinery as new `R/` module.
- Re-analyse P1's calibration and DCA outputs.
- Compare against bootstrap percentile and BCa as the field default.
